passage_text: This article does not apply to: (a) A person that has fewer than fifty full-time employees, unless the person uses an artificial intelligence system that the person has developed; (b) A financial institution or affiliate subject to and in compliance with the federal Equal Credit Opportunity Act, 15 U.S.C. sec. 1691 et seq., and its implementing regulation, Regulation B, 12 CFR part 1002; or (c) An insurer, insurance producer, or other person subject to and in compliance with applicable insurance regulations regarding the use of artificial intelligence systems.

exceptions.description: Small businesses with fewer than fifty full-time employees
exceptions.conditions: unless the person uses an artificial intelligence system that the person has developed

exceptions.description: Financial institutions in compliance with the federal Equal Credit Opportunity Act
exceptions.conditions: subject to and in compliance with ECOA and Regulation B

exceptions.description: Insurers subject to applicable insurance regulations regarding AI systems
exceptions.conditions: subject to and in compliance with applicable insurance regulations

ambiguity.ambiguous_text: applicable insurance regulations regarding the use of artificial intelligence systems
ambiguity.interpretation_notes: The reference to 'applicable insurance regulations' does not specify which regulations, potentially creating uncertainty about the scope of the exemption
ambiguity.suggested_clarification: Enumerate specific insurance regulations that qualify for this exemption
